titleZh: In re Caremark International Inc. Derivative Litigation
titleEn: In re Caremark International Inc. Derivative Litigation
issuesZh: 派生诉讼和董事忠实义务
holdingZh: Caremark 奠定了董事会监督义务的经典表述：董事若完全未尝试建立合理的信息和报告系统，可能因善意义务层面的失责而承担责任。
holdingEn: Caremark supplied the canonical formulation of board oversight: directors may face liability where they utterly fail to attempt to establish a reasonable information and reporting system.
